title: Garlic Kiddie Delight
description: A diabetic-friendly fermented dish featuring garlic bulb, prepared with sous-vide method for a dense and kid-friendly American meal.

ingredients.name: Garlic Bulb
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh, unpeeled bulbs for fermentation.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Extra virgin olive oil is recommended for health benefits and flavor enhancement.

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide water bath to 60°C (140°F).
Place the garlic bulbs in a plastic bag, pour the olive oil over them evenly, seal the bag well.
Submerge the sealed bag into the preheated water bath for 24 hours.
Once done, remove the bag from the water bath and allow it to cool naturally at room temperature. The garlic will ferment within this time.
Gently squeeze or crush the garlic cloves after cooling until desired density is achieved.
